member.name: T:Tlumach.Writers.ArbWriter
member.summary: A writer for the ARB (Application Resource Bundle) format.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Writers.BaseJsonWriter.IndentationStep
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of spaces to add for each level of indentation. The default value is 2.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Writers.BaseWriter
member.summary: The basic writer class for specialized format writers. It defines the basic methods that should be implemented by all writers.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Writers.BaseWriter.WriteTranslations(Tlumach.TranslationManager,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Globalization.CultureInfo},System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Writes translations in the format that supports multiple languages in one file.
member.param: The translation translationManager from which the translations should be picked.
The list of cultures to write.
The stream to write the resulting file to.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Writers.BaseWriter.WriteTranslation(Tlumach.TranslationManager,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Writes translations in the format that supports one language in one file.
member.param: The translation translationManager from which the translations should be picked.

The culture to write.
Set this parameter to to signal that the default translation should be written.
The stream to write the resulting file to.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Writers.BaseWriter.InternalWriteTranslations(Tlumach.TranslationManager,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Globalization.CultureInfo},System.IO.Stream)
member.param: The translation translationManager from which the translations should be picked.
The list of cultures to write.
The stream to write the resulting file to.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Writers.BaseWriter.IsParentKey(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Determines if the specified key is a parent of the given potential child key.
member.returns: True if parentKey is a parent of childKey; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Writers.BaseWriter.GetImmediateChild(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the immediate child key from a parent and its descendant key.
member.returns: The immediate child key name, or if parentKey is not a parent of descendantKey.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Writers.CsvWriter
member.summary: A writer for the CSV (comma-separated values) format.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Writers.CsvWriter.SeparatorChar
member.summary: Gets or sets the separator character used to separate values. Default is comma, but Excel uses semicolon ';' as a separator for exported CSVs.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Writers.IniWriter
member.summary: A writer for the simple INI format.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Writers.JsonWriter
member.summary: A writer for the basic Json format.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Writers.ResxWriter
member.summary: A writer for the .NET .resx XML format.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Writers.TomlWriter
member.summary: A writer for the TOML format.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Writers.TsvWriter
member.summary: A writer for the TSV (tab-separated values) format.
